prompts.title: New engineer first week
prompts.prompt: Read the repository structure, manifests, configs, and existing docs, then produce a repo onboarding brief.
minimum_expectations: List the setup sequence in the correct order.
Explain the major folders and runtime boundaries.
Suggest the safest first contribution areas and what is still unclear.

prompts.title: Cross-team handoff
prompts.prompt: Create a repo onboarding brief focused on service ownership transfer, risks, and operating habits.
minimum_expectations: Highlight commands, environments, and deployment touchpoints.
Flag hidden dependencies and unusual local setup steps.
State the high-risk areas that need direct human follow-up.

prompts.title: Open-source contributor guide
prompts.prompt: Produce an onboarding brief for a prospective contributor that explains the project shape, contribution path, and repo conventions.
minimum_expectations: Differentiate maintainer concerns from contributor concerns.
Recommend a first reading path through the repo.
End with a concrete first-task shortlist.
